metadata.description: Comprehensive catalog of MongoDB Atlas monitoring metrics and FTDC diagnostics

categories.name: Hardware & System
categories.description: CPU, memory, disk, and swap metrics

metrics.name: SYSTEM_CPU_IOWAIT
metrics.description: CPU time waiting for I/O operations

categories.name: Connections & Network
categories.description: Connection pool, network I/O, and request metrics

categories.name: Operations & OpCounters
categories.description: Operation counters and lock contention metrics

categories.name: Query Performance
categories.description: Query execution, targeting, and document metrics

metrics.name: QUERY_TARGETING_SCANNED_PER_RETURNED
metrics.description: Query efficiency ratio (index scans / docs returned)

metrics.name: QUERY_TARGETING_SCANNED_OBJECTS_PER_RETURNED
metrics.description: Query efficiency ratio (docs scanned / docs returned)

categories.name: Cache & WiredTiger
categories.description: WiredTiger cache, tickets, transactions, and storage engine metrics

metrics.name: CACHE_DIRTY_BYTES
metrics.description: Dirty bytes in cache awaiting checkpoint

metrics.name: WIREDTIGER_BLOCK_MANAGER_BLOCKS_READ
metrics.description: Blocks read from disk per second

metrics.name: WIREDTIGER_BLOCK_MANAGER_BLOCKS_WRITTEN
metrics.description: Blocks written to disk per second

metrics.name: WIREDTIGER_BLOCK_MANAGER_BYTES_READ
metrics.description: Bytes read from disk per second

categories.name: Replication
categories.description: Oplog, replication lag, and secondary sync metrics

metrics.name: REPL_NETWORK_GETMORES_TOTAL_MILLIS
metrics.description: Total time spent in replication getmores

categories.name: Database & Storage
categories.description: Database size, collection counts, and storage metrics

metrics.name: DATABASE_INDEX_COUNT
metrics.description: Total index count across all collections

categories.name: Asserts & Errors
categories.description: Server assertions, warnings, and error counters

categories.name: Atlas Search
categories.description: Atlas Search index and query performance metrics (NEW in 2025)

metrics.name: SEARCH_INDEXING_OPERATIONS
metrics.description: Search index update operations per second

metrics.name: SEARCH_DISK_USAGE
metrics.description: Disk space used by search indexes

categories.name: Process & Server
categories.description: Process-level CPU, memory, and server uptime metrics

metrics.name: PROCESS_NORMALIZED_CPU_USER
metrics.description: Normalized MongoDB process user CPU (0-100 scale)
